Notes.Text:
This update for corosync fixes the following issues:

- CVE-2025-30472: Fixed stack buffer overflow from 'orf_token_endian_convert' (bsc#1239987)
Notes.Title: Details

Vulnerabilities.Description: Corosync through 3.1.9, if encryption is disabled or the attacker knows the encryption key, has a stack-based buffer overflow in orf_token_endian_convert in exec/totemsrp.c via a large UDP packet.
